_note: Patterns (plan §8). areaGenerated, levelUp and zoneEntered are VERIFIED verbatim against a real capture (fixtures/act1-real.log, 2026-07-17). The 'chat' sigil filter remains assumption-based — chat lines are stripped from committed fixtures, so revisit it if a real chat line ever gets through. Regexes use named groups; only the distinctive substring is matched, so the timestamp/log-tag prefix is ignored. The tracker drops chat lines BEFORE parsing (privacy §11.1 + prevents a whisper from spoofing a level-up or zone).
